crime.value: Kidnapping of Taliyah, a girl with memory loss from being abandoned after head injury
crime.quote: The next day i turned on the tv just to see what happened in the morning and the weather man said Taliyah kidnapped

victim.value: Taliyah, vulnerable due to memory loss and being abandoned by friends after head injury
victim.quote: She lost her memory because she got hit by a rock playing with her friends and the rock came straight to her head

closed_world.value: School environment where narrator and Taliyah interact
closed_world.quote: When i got there i looked for Taliyah. I saw her and handcuffed her to my hand so i can show her all the things

investigator.value: Unnamed narrator who befriends Taliyah and learns about her past through news reports
investigator.quote: I wanted to help her out because i am that type of person

red_herring.value: Initial focus on Taliyah as dangerous and threatening, when she is actually the victim needing help
red_herring.quote: she looked dangerous her name was Taliyah.ps{i really want to know her but she seems like she will brake one of my bones

clue_fairness.value: News reports provide information to both narrator and reader simultaneously about Taliyah's background
clue_fairness.quote: I turned on the tv and i saw the news and it said missing girl named Mary. Then it said there is a mystery girl

social_world.value: School environment with teacher-student dynamics and classroom partnerships as social structure
social_world.quote: our teacher Mr.bradshaw he set me up with the new mystery girl

reveal_mechanic.value: Television news broadcasts serve as the mechanism for revealing backstory and resolution
reveal_mechanic.quote: she lost her memory because she got hit by a rock playing with her friends and the rock came straight to her head

media_and_audience.value: Television news frames the mystery girl narrative and her disappearance for public consumption
media_and_audience.quote: the weather man said Taliyah kidnapped and not found i was schoked when he said that

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's compulsive need to help others drives involvement despite personal discomfort and risk
investigator_wound.quote: I wanted to help her out because i am that type of person
